homepage.heroSubline: Secure your property with durable, custom fences. Expert installation and repair services across Long Beach.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Trust, Rooted in Long Beach
aboutText: Electric Gate Repair Long Beach started as a small, family-run operation right here in Long Beach. We saw a need for reliable, high-quality fencing solutions that could withstand our unique coastal environment.

We believe in doing things right the first time. Our approach is simple: listen to our clients, understand their needs, and deliver exceptional workmanship using only the finest materials. We're not just building fences; we're building lasting relationships.

Long Beach is our home, and we're committed to giving back. We actively support local community initiatives and strive to be a responsible and ethical business, contributing to the safety and beauty of our neighborhoods.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free estimate on your fence project. Call us now to discuss your needs.

services.name: Wood Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Classic wood fences installed with precision and built to last.
services.description:
Wood fences offer timeless appeal and a natural aesthetic, perfect for Long Beach's diverse neighborhoods. We specialize in constructing durable wood fences that can withstand the intense Long Beach sun and occasional Santa Ana winds. Our wood fences are pressure treated to resist rot and insect damage, ensuring longevity and beauty. Choose from a variety of wood types, including redwood, cedar, and pine, to create a custom look that complements your home. We handle everything from permits to post setting, ensuring a seamless installation process. Whether you're looking for a privacy fence, picket fence, or decorative fence, we've got you covered. We also offer staining and sealing services to protect your investment and enhance its natural beauty.

Our team understands the nuances of working with wood in a coastal environment. We use proven techniques to minimize warping and cracking, ensuring your fence looks great for years to come. We take pride in our craftsmanship and attention to detail, delivering wood fences that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing. We can also integrate custom gates and access points to seamlessly blend with your new fence.

We offer full wood fence repair services as well. From replacing broken pickets and posts to reinforcing sagging sections, we'll make sure your wood fence stays strong and beautiful.
process: Step 1: On-site consultation and design planning
Step 2: Material selection and permit acquisition
Step 3: Precise post setting and framework construction
Step 4: Professional wood installation, staining, and sealing
benefits: Enhanced property value and curb appeal
Natural aesthetic that complements any landscape
Durable construction built to withstand the elements

faq.question: What type of wood is best for fences in Long Beach?
faq.answer: Redwood and cedar are excellent choices due to their natural resistance to decay and insects. Pressure-treated pine is a cost-effective alternative.

faq.question: How long will a wood fence last in Long Beach?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, a well-constructed wood fence can last 15-20 years or more.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to install a wood fence in Long Beach?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is typically required for fence installations. We handle the permit process for you.

services.name: Vinyl Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Low-maintenance vinyl fences for lasting beauty and security.
services.description:
Vinyl fences are a popular choice for Long Beach homeowners seeking a durable, low-maintenance fencing solution. Resistant to fading, warping, and cracking, vinyl fences stand up to the harsh coastal climate without requiring painting or staining. Our vinyl fences come in a variety of styles and colors to complement any architectural style, from classic white picket fences to modern privacy fences. We offer professional installation services, ensuring your vinyl fence is properly installed and built to last.

We use only high-quality vinyl materials that are UV-resistant to prevent fading and discoloration. Our experienced installers take pride in their workmanship, ensuring your fence is level, secure, and aesthetically pleasing. Vinyl is a great choice for the Long Beach area, where the sun can damage less durable materials. It’s also easy to clean and maintain, making it a great choice for busy homeowners.

Vinyl fence repair is also one of our specialties. Cracks, warping, or other damage? We can help.
process: Step 1: Consultation and design selection
Step 2: Precise measurements and layout planning
Step 3: Professional post installation and panel assembly
Step 4: Final inspection and quality assurance
benefits: Variety of styles and colors to choose from
Increased property value and curb appeal

faq.question: How long will a vinyl fence last in Long Beach?
faq.answer: A high-quality vinyl fence can last 30 years or more with minimal maintenance.

faq.question: Does vinyl fencing fade in the sun?
faq.answer: Our vinyl fences are UV-resistant and designed to minimize fading and discoloration.

faq.question: Can vinyl fences be damaged by strong winds?
faq.answer: Our vinyl fences are engineered to withstand strong winds, but extreme weather conditions can cause damage. We offer repair services to address any issues.

services.name: Metal Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Strong and stylish metal fences for security and elegance.
services.description:
Metal fences offer a combination of security, durability, and aesthetic appeal. Ideal for Long Beach properties seeking enhanced protection, our metal fences are constructed from high-quality steel or aluminum and finished with a powder coating for superior weather resistance. Choose from a range of styles, including wrought iron, ornamental steel, and chain-link, to create a custom look that complements your property. We provide expert installation services, ensuring your metal fence is securely anchored and built to last.

Metal fences are a great choice for Long Beach, offering security and durability in a stylish package. Whether you're looking to enclose a pool area, secure your property perimeter, or add a decorative touch to your landscape, we have a metal fence solution to meet your needs. Our metal fences are also resistant to pests and fire, making them a safe and reliable choice for Long Beach homeowners. We take pride in our craftsmanship and attention to detail, delivering metal fences that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing.

We provide metal fence repair services for damaged or weathered fences. Welding, rust removal, and protective coatings are all part of our fence repair service.
process: Step 1: Site assessment and design consultation
Step 2: Material selection and fabrication
Step 3: Professional installation with secure anchoring
Step 4: Finishing and protective coating application
benefits: Variety of styles to complement any property

faq.question: Are metal fences prone to rust in Long Beach's coastal climate?
faq.answer: Our metal fences are powder-coated for superior rust resistance. Regular maintenance can further extend their lifespan.

faq.question: Can metal fences be customized to match my property's style?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a range of styles and finishes to customize your metal fence to your preferences.

faq.question: Do metal fences require painting?
faq.answer: Our powder-coated metal fences do not require painting. The powder coating provides long-lasting protection and color.

services.name: Gate Repair and Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert gate services for smooth operation and enhanced security.
services.description:
A properly functioning gate is essential for security and convenience. We offer comprehensive gate repair and installation services for Long Beach residents. Whether you need a new gate installed, an existing gate repaired, or an automatic gate system serviced, we have the expertise and experience to get the job done right. We work with all types of gates, including wood, vinyl, metal, and automatic gates.

Our gate repair services include hinge replacement, latch repair, gate realignment, and automatic gate system troubleshooting. We use only high-quality parts and materials to ensure lasting repairs. Our installation services include custom gate design, fabrication, and professional installation. We can help you choose the right gate style and material to complement your property and meet your security needs. We also offer automatic gate opener installation and repair services.

We understand the importance of a secure and reliable gate. Our team is committed to providing prompt, professional service and exceptional workmanship. We stand behind our work and guarantee your satisfaction.
process: Step 1: Thorough gate inspection and diagnosis
Step 2: Repair or replacement of damaged components
Step 3: Alignment and adjustment for smooth operation
Step 4: Testing and quality assurance
benefits: Peace of mind knowing your gate is in good working order

faq.question: How often should I have my gate serviced?
faq.answer: We recommend annual gate servicing to ensure smooth operation and prevent costly repairs.

faq.question: Can you repair my automatic gate opener?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in automatic gate opener repair and installation.

faq.question: What are the signs that my gate needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs of gate problems include squeaking, sagging, difficulty opening or closing, and rust or corrosion.

services.name: Fence Staining and Sealing
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your wood fence with professional staining and sealing.
services.description:
Protect your wood fence from the elements with our professional staining and sealing services. Long Beach's intense sun and occasional rain can wreak havoc on wood fences, causing them to fade, crack, and warp. Our staining and sealing services help to protect your fence from these damaging effects, extending its lifespan and enhancing its natural beauty. We use only high-quality stains and sealants that are specifically designed for outdoor use.

Our staining process involves thorough cleaning and preparation of the wood surface, followed by the application of a high-quality stain in your choice of color. Our sealing process involves applying a sealant that penetrates the wood and protects it from moisture damage. We offer a variety of stain colors to complement your home and landscape. Our experienced technicians take pride in their workmanship, ensuring a smooth, even finish.

Properly staining and sealing your wood fence can significantly extend its lifespan and prevent costly repairs. Protect your investment with our professional staining and sealing services.
process: Step 1: Thorough fence cleaning and preparation
Step 2: Application of high-quality stain or sealant
Step 3: Even distribution and penetration for optimal protection
Step 4: Final inspection and quality assurance
benefits: Protection from sun, rain, and pests

faq.question: How often should I stain and seal my wood fence?
faq.answer: We recommend staining and sealing your wood fence every 2-3 years to maintain its beauty and protection.

faq.question: What type of stain is best for fences in Long Beach?
faq.answer: Oil-based stains offer superior protection from the elements, while water-based stains are more environmentally friendly.

faq.question: Can I stain and seal my fence myself?
faq.answer: While DIY staining and sealing is possible, professional application ensures a smooth, even finish and optimal protection.

services.name: Chain Link Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Affordable and practical chain link fences for security and containment.
services.description:
Chain link fences are a cost-effective and practical solution for securing your property in Long Beach. Ideal for residential, commercial, and industrial applications, chain link fences offer reliable security and containment at an affordable price. We offer professional chain link fence installation services, ensuring your fence is properly installed and built to last. Our chain link fences are available in a variety of heights and gauges to meet your specific needs.

Chain link fences are a popular choice for Long Beach businesses and homeowners seeking a durable and low-maintenance fencing solution. Whether you need to enclose a yard, secure a construction site, or protect your property perimeter, we have a chain link fence solution to meet your needs. Our chain link fences are galvanized for rust resistance and are available with optional vinyl coating for added protection and aesthetic appeal.

We have years of experience installing security fencing in Long Beach. We are committed to providing prompt, professional service and exceptional workmanship. We stand behind our work and guarantee your satisfaction.
process: Step 1: Site evaluation and layout planning
Step 2: Post installation with concrete anchoring
Step 3: Mesh attachment and tensioning
Step 4: Gate installation and hardware adjustment
benefits: Versatile for residential, commercial, and industrial applications

faq.question: How long will a chain link fence last in Long Beach?
faq.answer: A well-maintained chain link fence can last 20-30 years or more.

faq.question: Can I add privacy slats to my chain link fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer privacy slats in a variety of colors to enhance the privacy of your chain link fence.

faq.question: Are chain link fences easy to climb?
faq.answer: While chain link fences can be climbed, the addition of barbed wire or anti-climb mesh can deter intruders.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Electric Gate Repair Long Beach installed a beautiful redwood fence in my backyard. The team was professional, efficient, and the fence looks amazing! It really enhances the curb appeal of my home. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: My automatic gate was malfunctioning, and Electric Gate Repair Long Beach came out and fixed it quickly. The technician was knowledgeable and explained the problem clearly. Great service!

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: I love my new vinyl fence! It's exactly what I wanted, and the installation was seamless. The crew was respectful of my property and cleaned up everything afterward. Very happy with the results.

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: Electric Gate Repair Long Beach did an excellent job staining my wood fence. It looks brand new! The team was meticulous and paid attention to every detail. I would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Susan H.
reviews.text: We hired Electric Gate Repair Long Beach to install a metal fence around our commercial property. The fence is sturdy and provides excellent security. The installation process was smooth and efficient.

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: Needed a quick and affordable solution to secure my backyard. Electric Gate Repair Long Beach installed a chain link fence that got the job done! Fast service and fair pricing.

serviceAreas.content:
Electric Gate Repair Long Beach is proud to offer our expert fence and gate services throughout Los Angeles. From the iconic Hollywood Hills to the vibrant downtown area, we understand the unique needs of Los Angeles residents. We specialize in providing durable and aesthetically pleasing fencing solutions that complement the city's diverse architectural styles. Whether you own a classic 1920s Spanish Colonial Revival home or a modern condo, we can help secure your property with a beautiful and functional fence or gate.

Our team is experienced in working with all types of fencing materials, including wood, vinyl, wrought iron, and chain link. We also offer gate repair and installation services to ensure your property is safe and secure. Los Angeles experiences a warm, dry climate year-round, so we focus on using materials that are resistant to the elements and will last for years to come. We are committed to providing exceptional customer service and top-quality workmanship to all of our Los Angeles clients.
serviceAreas.localContext: Los Angeles is known for its diverse architecture, including many 1920s Spanish Colonial Revival homes, and its warm, dry climate.

serviceAreas.content:

We specialize in crafting fences that enhance the curb appeal of your home while providing security and privacy.
